mapper.select: SELECT brand_id FROM app_merchants_brand WHERE user_b_id = #{id} AND state = 1
select * from app_b_user t1 where t1.id=#{userId} for update
select * from app_b_user t1 where t1.username=#{phone}
SELECT * FROM app_b_user WHERE id = #{userBId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM app_b_user
SELECT up_id upId FROM app_b_user where up_id is not null
SELECT id,merchants_name merchantsName,address,username FROM app_b_user WHERE is_company = 1 AND state = 1
select * from app_b_user where username = #{phone}
SELECT user_b_id FROM app_user_b_message as a WHERE a.id = 1
SELECT a.url FROM app_file_url as a LEFT JOIN js_sys_file_upload as b on a.file_id = b.file_id WHERE b.id = #{uploadId} and a.type = 1
SELECT a.url FROM app_file_url as a LEFT JOIN js_sys_file_upload as b on a.file_id = b.file_id WHERE b.id = #{uploadId} and a.type = 1
SELECT a.url FROM app_file_url as a LEFT JOIN js_sys_file_upload as b on a.file_id = b.file_id WHERE b.id = #{uploadId} and a.type = 1
SELECT a.id FROM app_file_url as a WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_b_user WHERE state = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_b_user WHERE state <> 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_b_user
SELECT insurance_id FROM app_insurance_merchants WHERE user_b_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) brandId,COALESCE(SUM(fixloss),0) balance FROM app_indent WHERE user_b_id = #{id}
SELECT city_name FROM app_city WHERE citycode = #{id} limit 0,1
SELECT id, balance, up_id upId, username, name FROM app_b_user WHERE up_id = #{id1}
SELECT * FROM app_b_user WHERE state = 1 and type = 1
